content.query:
select  
srs.Division
,srs.LP_LeadSubSourceID
,srs.SourceCode
,srs.LeadSubSource
,srs.Active
,LeadCount.LeadCount
from [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
inner join (
SELECT
Division
,SourceCode
,LeadSubSource
,count(1) as RecordCount
FROM [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE]
where 
Active = 'True'
group by 
Division
,SourceCode
,LeadSubSource 
having count(1) > 1
) dupes
on 
srs.LeadSubSource = dupes.LeadSubSource
and srs.SourceCode = dupes.SourceCode
and srs.Division = dupes.Division
left join
(
    select
    LeadSubSourceID, 
    count(1) LeadCount
    from EDW.FACT_LEAD
    group by LeadSubSourceID
) LeadCount
on 
srs.LeadSubSourceID = LeadCount.LeadSubSourceID
order by 
srs.Division
,srs.SourceCode
,srs.LeadSubSource 
,srs.LeadSubSourceID
